places.name: Formosa Boulevard Station
places.address: 中山一路, 新興區, 高雄市, 臺灣
places.note: MRT station housing the world's largest glass dome art installation, free to enter

places.name: Liuhe Night Market
places.address: 六合二路, 新興區, 高雄市, 臺灣
places.note: Kaohsiung's most accessible tourist night market, famous for papaya milk and seafood

places.name: Love River
places.note: Waterfront promenade along a city canal, lit up at night, with cafes and a cheap cruise

places.name: Kaohsiung Music Center
places.address: 海邊路, 苓雅區, 高雄市, 臺灣
places.note: Striking waterfront concert venue that glows in changing colours after dark

places.name: Ruifeng Night Market
places.address: 裕誠路, 鼓山區, 高雄市, 臺灣
places.note: Large local night market known for its exceptional density of food stalls
